title: Senior Radiologist at Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Senior Radiologist at Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises in Allahabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises:
Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lilavati Hospital International Enterprises!
